competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 cursor.com/changelog 及第三方报道]
Enterprise customers can now manage multiple Cursor teams from one place, with different security, governance, budget, and feature controls for each. Shared canvases can now be opened full-screen in the browser, and agents can embed buttons in canvases that will run a specific prompt when clicked. Cloud Agents launched as headline feature of v3.5 — agents run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal/browser/desktop access, work across multiple repos in parallel, and report results back to the IDE asynchronously. v3.0: new interface runs many agents in parallel across repos and environments — locally, in worktrees, in the cloud, and on remote SSH, centered around agents. v3.2 added /multitask async subagents and multi-root workspaces for cross-repo agent sessions.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 cursor.com/changelog 及第三方报道]
Enterprise customers can now manage multiple Cursor teams from one place, with different security, governance, budget, and feature controls for

changes.description: 上线「Shared canvases」并支持 agent 在 canvas 中嵌入可点击按钮直接触发 prompt 执行（首次抓取观察到，非确认本周新增）
changes.evidence: 「Shared canvases can now be opened full-screen in the browser, and agents can embed buttons in canvases that will run a specific prompt when clicked」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2（跨工具 artifact live link，非 snapshot）+ 锚点 #3（descriptive-first canvas）：可交互、可执行的共享 canvas 与 meee2 的 descriptive canvas + live link 组合高度结构相似

changes.description: Cloud Agents：agent 在隔离云端 VM 中跨多仓库并行工作，并异步把结果回传到 IDE（session 跨环境流转）
changes.evidence: 「Cloud Agents launched as the headline feature — agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel, and report results back to your IDE asynchronously」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（人=慢 session、AI=快 session 同协议）：异步回传到 IDE 的模式正在向「快 session 向慢 session 汇报」的协议方向演化

changes.description: 新界面定位为「centered around agents」，可在本地/worktree/云端/远程 SSH 间统一管理并行 agent
changes.evidence: 「The new interface allows you to run many agents in parallel across repos and environments: locally, in worktrees, in the cloud, and on remote SSH, centered around agents while keeping the depth of a development environment」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：跨环境并行 agent 管理界面，正在朝「统一协议管理多 session」演化

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
「Shared canvases + 可点击执行按钮」是本轮抓取中与 meee2 锚点 #2/#3 重叠度最高的单一发现，建议重点关注其后续演化方向（是否会发展为跨工具 live link）
Cloud Agents + 异步回传 IDE 的模式表明 Cursor 正在构建「快 session 向慢 session 汇报」的雏形协议

competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
fetched_urls: WebSearch: OpenAI ChatGPT Canvas Projects new features agent tasks 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 openai.com 及 OpenAI Help Center 页面摘要]
Canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking; writing/coding functionality is now supported directly in chat responses through writing blocks and code blocks (canvas being folded into chat). Projects in ChatGPT: Team users now support up to 40 uploaded files (up from 20). ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU adds workspace agents for shared workflows plus new admin controls and activity visibility — 'Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools.' Codex: richer context awareness, longer-running tasks, Goal mode GA, locked computer use. Codex can now create and share interactive, hosted websites and apps — dashboards, planners, review workspaces, project boards, galleries — shareable with anyone in the workspace via URL, 'giving teams a shared place to explore work, contribute input, track progress, and make decisions together.'
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 openai.com 及 OpenAI Help Center 页面摘要]
Canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking; writing/coding functionality is now supported directly in ch

changes.description: Codex 新增可创建并通过 URL 分享的「交互式托管网站/应用」，定位为团队探索工作、贡献输入、追踪进展、共同决策的共享空间
changes.evidence: 「Codex can now create and share interactive, hosted websites and apps... Sites can be shared with anyone in your workspace via URL, giving teams a shared place to explore work, contribute input, track progress, and make decisions together」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2（跨工具 artifact live link，而非 snapshot）+ 锚点 #4（跨 session/工具/owner 的 artifact pull）：「可分享 URL 的交互式工作空间、共同决策」与 meee2 的 live link + descriptive canvas 组合直接重叠

changes.description: Canvas 功能正从独立模式收编进 chat 内的 writing/code blocks（GPT-5.5 系列不再支持独立 canvas）
changes.evidence: 「Canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking. Writing and coding functionality is now supported directly in chat responses through writing blocks and code blocks」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3（descriptive-first canvas）：OpenAI 在弱化独立 canvas 范式、转向 chat 内嵌 block，与 meee2 的「canvas 为核心」路线方向相反，短期内降低该维度重叠度

changes.description: Enterprise/EDU 新增「workspace agents」支持跨工具共享工作流，并提供管理员控制与活动可见性
changes.evidence: 「ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU adds workspace agents for shared workflows plus new admin controls and activity visibility. Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：企业级「跨工具协同 agent + 活动可见性」正在向人机协作治理协议方向延伸

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
Codex 的「可分享 URL 的交互式托管站点」是本轮抓取中触碰 meee2 live-link 锚点最直接的发现之一
Canvas 独立模式被收编进 chat blocks，是与 meee2「canvas 为核心」定位相反的信号，短期缓解该维度竞争压力

competitors.name: Windsurf (Codeium)
fetched_urls: WebSearch: site:codeium.com OR site:windsurf.com Windsurf Codeium AI editor 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 windsurf.com/changelog 及第三方评测]
Devin Desktop is the new name for Windsurf — building on the Windsurf IDE foundation to introduce 'the command center for managing all your agents in one place.' The Agent Command Center (Spaces, Kanban view, and multi-agent management) is front and center, while the full IDE experience remains accessible. Wave 13: improved Cascade Memory System remembering codebase structure/preferences across conversations; enhanced multi-model routing; Supercomplete accuracy boost; new MCP tool support (Supabase, Notion, GitHub). Devin now available for Terminal — all Windsurf users can use this CLI agent; new Devin Local agent is up to 30% more token-efficient than Cascade.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 windsurf.com/changelog 及第三方评测]
Devin Desktop is the new name for Windsurf — building on the Windsurf IDE foundation to introduce 'the command center for managing all your ag

changes.description: 品牌从 Windsurf 重塑为「Devin Desktop」，定位转向「管理你所有 agent 的统一指挥中心」，主打 Spaces / Kanban 视图 / 多 agent 管理
changes.evidence: 「Devin Desktop is the new name for Windsurf. The company is building on the IDE foundation of Windsurf to introduce the command center for managing all your agents in one place. The Agent Command Center (Spaces, Kanban view, and multi-agent management) is front and center」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议，人在 agent 图内）：「统一指挥中心管理所有 agent」是该领域中与 meee2 session 同构理念结构最接近的重新定位之一，但目前仍是「AI agent 管理」视角，未见「人也是 session」的协议框架

changes.description: Cascade Memory System 升级，跨对话记住代码库结构与偏好；新增 MCP 工具支持（Supabase / Notion / GitHub）
changes.evidence: 「Improved Cascade Memory System that remembers codebase structure and preferences across conversations... New MCP Tool Support integrating services like Supabase, Notion, and GitHub」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4（跨工具 artifact pull）：MCP 跨工具集成持续扩展

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
「Devin Desktop」品牌重塑 + Agent Command Center 是本轮发现中威胁信号最强的定位变化：行业正在向「统一指挥中心管理多 agent session」收敛，这正是 meee2 试图抢占的心智位置
目前 Windsurf/Devin 的指挥中心仍是「管理 AI agent」框架，尚未采用「人也是 session、同协议」的表述——这仍是 meee2 的差异化窗口

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch: site:anthropic.com Claude new features projects artifacts routines agent 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 anthropic.com/news 系列页面摘要]
Projects: Claude.ai Pro/Team users can organize chats into Projects with a 200K context window. Artifacts: 'Artifacts appear in a dedicated window alongside conversations... creating a dynamic workspace where they can see, edit, and build upon Claude's creations in real-time. Artifacts now support MCP and persistent storage.' Routines have been introduced in Claude Code, supporting automation of repetitive tasks. Claude Code: 'you can now assemble agent teams to work on tasks together. Claude Code on desktop has been redesigned for parallel agents.' Claude Opus 4.7 released April 2026; Opus 4.6 features 1M token context window in beta.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 anthropic.com/news 系列页面摘要]
Projects: Claude.ai Pro/Team users can organize chats into Projects with a 200K context window. Artifacts: 'Artifacts appear in a dedicated window

changes.description: Artifacts 升级为「实时动态工作区」并新增 MCP 与持久化存储支持（从一次性快照转向可持续、可连接外部工具的活态产物）
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts appear in a dedicated window alongside conversations... creating a dynamic workspace where they can see, edit, and build upon Claude's creations in real-time. Artifacts now support MCP and persistent storage」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2（跨工具 artifact live link，而非 snapshot）：Artifacts 从「快照」向「持久化 + 跨工具连接（MCP）+ 实时协作」演化，是本轮所有发现中与该锚点结构最接近的单点信号——且来自 meee2 所依赖的底层平台本身

changes.description: Claude Code 新增「组建 agent 团队协同工作」能力，桌面端为并行 agent 重新设计
changes.evidence: 「In Claude Code, you can now assemble agent teams to work on tasks together. Claude Code on desktop has been redesigned for parallel agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议）：「assemble agent teams」「parallel agents」表明 Anthropic 正自建多 session 协同原语，是平台层面最直接的结构性重叠来源

changes.description: Claude Code 引入「Routines」支持重复任务自动化（与本竞品监控 pipeline 所运行的 Routine 机制同名/同概念）
changes.evidence: 「Routines have been introduced in Claude Code, supporting the automation of repetitive tasks」

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
Artifacts 向「持久化 + MCP 连接 + 实时协作」演化，是本轮抓取中唯一直接来自底层平台、且与 meee2 核心差异化（live link / descriptive canvas）高度重叠的信号，建议作为最高优先级长期观察对象
Claude Code 的 agent teams / parallel agents 表明 Anthropic 自身也在构建多 session 协同原语，需持续评估 meee2 与平台原生能力之间的边界与差异化空间

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
fetched_urls: WebSearch: GitHub Copilot new features agent workspace background tasks 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 github.blog 及第三方报道摘要；与上次 baseline（github.com/features/copilot 正文）内容来源不同，按新内容处理]
Copilot Workspace reached GA at Microsoft Build 2026 — reasons across an entire repo, proposes multi-file edits, runs tests, iterates autonomously. New operating modes: Fleet mode (CLI operates autonomously on narrow tasks without per-step confirmation), Autopilot mode (schedules autonomous background-task operation). From July 2026, Enterprise customers get Autonomous Agent Mode (writes/tests/commits entire feature branches) with a new Agent Sandbox (ephemeral Linux container per task). GitHub Copilot App: 'introduces a My Work view that consolidates active agent sessions, issues, pull requests, and background automations into a single dashboard. Every agent session runs in its own isolated Git worktree, meaning parallel agents can operate on the same codebase without conflicts.' /every schedules recurring prompts and background tasks; cloud automations respond to GitHub events.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 github.blog 及第三方报道摘要；与上次 baseline（github.com/features/copilot 正文）内容来源不同，按新内容处理]
Copilot Workspace reached GA at Microsoft Build 2026 — reasons across an entire repo, propose

changes.description: GitHub Copilot 推出独立桌面 App，核心是「My Work」视图——将所有活跃 agent session、issue、PR、后台自动化统一汇总到单一仪表盘，每个 agent session 运行在独立隔离的 Git worktree 中
changes.evidence: 「The app introduces a 'My Work' view that consolidates active agent sessions, issues, pull requests, and background automations into a single dashboard. Every agent session runs in its own isolated Git worktree, meaning parallel agents can operate on the same codebase without conflicts」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议）+ 锚点 #5（peripheral 层）：独立桌面 app + 统一汇总所有 agent session 到单一面板，正是 meee2「菜单栏统一戳 session」心智的直接竞争形态

changes.description: 新增 Autopilot / Fleet 自治模式与 Agent Sandbox（每任务独立临时 Linux 容器），支持企业级无人值守后台 agent 工作流
changes.evidence: 「Autopilot mode schedules autonomous operation on background tasks — Copilot acts on a bounded issue without a developer present... A new Agent Sandbox spins up an ephemeral Linux container for each task, so the agent cannot affect the production repository until a reviewer merges the pull request」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：后台自治 + 沙箱隔离 session 的治理范式持续完善，强化「企业统一管理人机 session」方向

key_findings: 本次抓取来源（WebSearch 整合 github.blog 系列文章）与上次 baseline（github.com/features/copilot 单页正文）不同，按新内容独立分析，原 raw_snapshot 不可直接 diff
GitHub Copilot 推出独立 agent-native 桌面 app + 「My Work」统一仪表盘，是本轮发现中与 meee2「菜单栏 + 统一戳 session」心智重叠度最高的产品形态变化

competitors.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Google Gemini AI Studio Workspace new features agent canvas 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 blog.google / cloud.google.com / gemini.google 系列页面摘要]
AI Studio now runs on Gemini 3.5 Flash and integrates with Antigravity (Google's agentic coding harness): native Kotlin support, one-click deploy to Cloud Run, dedicated mobile app, 'Chrome DevTools for agents' — your agent can automate quality audits, emulate real-world user experiences, hand over sessions with auto-connect, and more without manual oversight. Workspace: 'Agent Designer, a visual flow canvas for building agent workflows, is in preview. Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank, which give agents persistent context across interactions, are generally available.' Coming to private preview: schedule Calendar meetings and create/view/edit Docs and Slides directly from canvas mode in Gemini Enterprise app. New 'Agent Garden' provides prebuilt agent solutions.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 blog.google / cloud.google.com / gemini.google 系列页面摘要]
AI Studio now runs on Gemini 3.5 Flash and integrates with Antigravity (Google's agentic coding harness): native Kotli

changes.description: 「Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank」正式 GA，作为命名为 Sessions 的持久化跨交互上下文产品原语；同时支持「session 自动连接交接」
changes.evidence: 「Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank, which give agents persistent context across interactions, are generally available」「your agent can... hand over sessions with auto-connect... without manual oversight」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议）：Google 已将「Session」作为正式 GA 产品原语命名并支持跨场景交接，是行业层面对「session 即基本单位」最直接的术语级印证

changes.description: 「Agent Designer」可视化流程 canvas 进入预览，用于构建 agent 工作流；Gemini Enterprise app 即将支持从 canvas 模式直接创建/编辑 Docs、Slides 并安排日历会议
changes.evidence: 「Agent Designer, a visual flow canvas for building agent workflows, is in preview」「customers will soon also be able to schedule Google Calendar meetings and seamlessly create, view, and edit Docs and Slides directly from canvas mode in the Gemini Enterprise app」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3（descriptive-first canvas）+ 锚点 #4（跨工具 artifact pull）：可视化 canvas 直接驱动跨应用（Calendar/Docs/Slides）操作，结构上接近 meee2 的 descriptive canvas + 跨工具 live link 组合

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
Google 把「Session」做成正式 GA 产品名词（Agent Engine Sessions + Memory Bank + 自动交接），是本轮所有发现中术语层面与 meee2 核心抽象重叠度最高的信号
Agent Designer 可视化 canvas + 跨应用直接编辑（Docs/Slides/Calendar）的组合值得持续追踪，可能演化为对 meee2 descriptive canvas 定位的直接竞争

competitors.name: Linear
fetched_urls: WebSearch: site:linear.app Linear changelog AI automation agent 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 linear.app/changelog 系列条目摘要]
Linear Agent now in public beta for all teams (Agent + Skills on all plans; Automations + Code Intelligence on Business/Enterprise). Skills: save good conversation results as reusable skills for recurring workflows. Automations: trigger agent workflows when issues enter triage. Code Intelligence extends Linear Agent's understanding to the codebase. 'Linear Agent can now connect to your tools via MCP, giving it access to data and actions beyond your Linear workspace to investigate issues, plan projects, write specs, and draft updates.' Linear Diffs: review PR diffs natively from any issue and iterate with agents. 'You can now launch your preferred coding tool directly from a Linear issue, with a prefilled prompt that includes the issue ID and all relevant context.'
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 linear.app/changelog 系列条目摘要]
Linear Agent now in public beta for all teams (Agent + Skills on all plans; Automations + Code Intelligence on Business/Enterprise). Skills: sav

changes.description: Linear Agent 公测上线，并通过 MCP 连接外部工具，可在 Linear 工作区之外调查问题、规划项目、撰写 spec
changes.evidence: 「Linear Agent can now connect to your tools via MCP, giving it access to data and actions beyond your Linear workspace to investigate issues, plan projects, write specs, and draft updates」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4（跨 session/工具/owner 的 artifact pull）：「跨工作区调查与执行」是该锚点的典型形态

changes.description: 新增「Deeplink to AI coding tools」：从 Linear issue 一键启动外部编码工具，并自动带上含 issue ID 与完整上下文的预填 prompt
changes.evidence: 「You can now launch your preferred coding tool directly from a Linear issue, with a prefilled prompt that includes the issue ID and all relevant context」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2（跨工具 artifact live link，而非 snapshot）：「带上下文的跨工具直达链接」与 meee2 的 live link 概念结构高度相似——区别在于这是「单向 deeplink」而非双向活态链接

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
Linear Agent + MCP + Deeplink 组合表明 Linear 正从「项目管理工具」向「跨工具 agent 协同枢纽」演化，是本轮 hi 级竞品中结构性重叠提升最明显的一个
「带上下文预填 prompt 的跨工具 deeplink」与 meee2 live link 理念接近，但目前仍是单向跳转而非双向活态同步——这是当前的差异化边界

competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
fetched_urls: WebSearch: new AI workspace productivity tool launch 2026 site:producthunt.com
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 producthunt.com 分类页与产品页摘要]
Recent 2026 launches skew toward specialized, execution-focused automation. Yansu: 'AI that learns how you work and turns it into software' — spots repeated tasks across files, messages, and workflows, then turns the best patterns into apps and automations (#3 Day Rank, 367 points). Polsia: AI system that runs companies autonomously (planning, coding, marketing, ops). Espa: AI executive assistant for to-do's/scheduling/email. Coworker AI: context-aware model routing to cut enterprise AI token costs. Trend: tools like Manus Shopify Connector targeting commerce ops, Yansu reflecting a 'local-first' pattern of learning desktop routines and turning them into internal workflows.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 producthunt.com 分类页与产品页摘要]
Recent 2026 launches skew toward specialized, execution-focused automation. Yansu: 'AI that learns how you work and turns it into software' — spot

changes.description: 新晋产品 Yansu 定位为「学习你的真实工作方式并将其转化为软件」，从文件/消息/工作流中识别重复模式并生成自动化
changes.evidence: 「Yansu: AI that learns how you work and turns it into software by spotting repeated tasks across files, messages, and workflows, then turning the best patterns into apps and automations」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3（descriptive-first：flow 从真实行为 emerge）：Yansu 的核心叙事「从真实工作方式中学习并生成软件」与 meee2 的 descriptive-first 理念在结构上直接重叠，是本轮新入场观察名单中信号最强的一个

key_findings: 首次纳入监控的新品雷达源，本次为建立基线（无历史 raw_snapshot 可 diff）
新晋产品 Yansu「从真实行为中 emerge 工作流」的叙事值得持续追踪，是否会向「人机同协议 session」方向延伸尚不明朗，暂不计入 alert（来源为新品雷达类目，非具体竞品威胁评估对象，且 threat 维持 md）

competitors.name: Notion AI
fetched_urls: WebSearch: site:notion.so Notion AI new features agent automation connector 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 notion.so / info.notion.so 页面摘要]
Notion positions itself as 'Where teams and agents work together' — a collaborative AI workspace built on company context, where teams build and orchestrate agents alongside their projects, meetings, and connected apps. Custom Agents: automated systems that learn your workflows, understand your context, and handle busywork; can connect to Slack, databases, and docs so they 'work where teams already work.' Notion API allows developers to connect other software to Notion or automate workflows; partners (Zapier, Typeform, Automate.io) building connections to bring information from disparate apps into Notion. '100 Notion AI Agent Use Cases' resource published for automating routine work and keeping knowledge up to date.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 notion.so / info.notion.so 页面摘要]
Notion positions itself as 'Where teams and agents work together' — a collaborative AI workspace built on company context, where teams build

changes.description: 整体定位语转向「Where teams and agents work together」，强调团队与 agent 在同一工作区内并肩协作、围绕项目与已连接应用编排 agent
changes.evidence: 「Notion describes itself as a collaborative AI workspace built on company context, where teams can build and orchestrate agents alongside their projects, meetings, and connected apps」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议）：「团队与 agent 共同工作」的表述方向接近 meee2 的人机协同框架，但 Notion 仍是文档/数据库范式，未触及 session 同构或 live link 的结构核心

changes.description: Custom Agents 可学习工作流并理解上下文，连接 Slack/数据库/文档，「在团队已经工作的地方工作」
changes.evidence: 「Notion has built Custom Agents—automated systems that learn your workflows, understand your context, and handle busywork... They can be connected to Slack, databases, and docs so they work where teams already work」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4（跨工具 artifact pull）：连接 Slack/数据库/文档的跨应用 agent 持续扩展

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
「Where teams and agents work together」定位转向值得记录，但 Notion 当前产品形态仍以文档/数据库协作为核心范式，与 meee2 的 session 同构 + live link 结构性差异仍然明显，threat 维持 md

competitors.name: Slack
fetched_urls: WebSearch: site:slack.com Slack new AI features agent canvas automation 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 slack.com 系列页面摘要]
Generative AI is now a native step in every Slack workflow — write a prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), have an LLM generate a response as part of a workflow (AI Generate step in Workflow Builder). Developer platform: single 'slack create agent' command, enhanced Bolt framework, bring-your-own-LLM, two open-source sample agents (Starter Agent, Support Agent) supporting Claude SDK / OpenAI SDK / Pydantic AI. Updated Block Kit: cards, alerts, carousel, code/data tables for high-density interactive agent UIs. 'Slackbot has full, native context of where you are and what you're working on, seeing what you have open in Slack — a Salesforce record, a canvas, a channel — and using that to give you smarter answers and take more relevant action, right in the moment.'
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 slack.com 系列页面摘要]
Generative AI is now a native step in every Slack workflow — write a prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), have an LLM generate a r

changes.description: Slackbot 升级为对用户当前所处上下文（打开的 Salesforce 记录、canvas、频道）具备原生感知，据此给出更相关的回答与操作建议
changes.evidence: 「Slackbot has full, native context of where you are and what you're working on, seeing what you have open in Slack— a Salesforce record, a canvas, a channel — and using that to give you smarter answers and take more relevant action, right in the moment」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5（peripheral 层：不切焦点感知当前情境）：「感知你当前打开的内容并即时行动」与 meee2 菜单栏 peripheral 层的「不切焦点介入 session」理念方向接近，但 Slack 仍局限于自身产品内的上下文（非跨工具/跨 owner）

changes.description: Workflow Builder 新增 AI Generate 步骤，可基于选定知识源（频道/canvas/列表）生成内容并嵌入任意自动化流程
changes.evidence: 「Generative AI is now a native step in every Slack workflow, allowing users to write a prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), and have an LLM generate a response as part of a workflow」

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
Slackbot「原生情境感知 + 即时行动」的方向与 meee2 peripheral 层理念存在方向性接近，但目前仅限 Slack 自身产品内情境，跨工具边界尚未打通，threat 维持 md

competitors.name: Reflect
fetched_urls: WebSearch: site:reflect.app OR site:x.com Reflect notes app new features AI sync 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 reflect.app/blog 系列文章摘要]
March 2026: Reflect launched an MCP server to access and search notes directly from within Claude and Codex; expanded in April 2026 ('Edit your notes with coding agents') to let users edit notes through coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. Reflect added GPT-4o for faster AI voice transcription, assistant, and notes chat. Auto-generates short AI summaries when saving links. Readwise integration syncs bookmarked Tweets, Kindle/Apple Books highlights, podcast highlights. Real-time sync across devices; offline image support; AI palette editor and Advanced Search filtering now on iOS.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 reflect.app/blog 系列文章摘要]
March 2026: Reflect launched an MCP server to access and search notes directly from within Claude and Codex; expanded in April 2026 ('Edit your note

changes.description: 上线 MCP server 让 Claude / Codex 直接访问并搜索 Reflect 笔记，并扩展为支持用编码 agent（Claude Code、Cursor、Codex）直接编辑笔记内容
changes.evidence: 「In March 2026, Reflect notes launched an MCP server to access and search notes directly from within Claude and Codex, with expanded functionality in April 2026 to let you edit notes through coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4（跨 session/工具/owner 的 artifact pull）：「让外部编码 agent 直接读写笔记 artifact」是该锚点的典型形态，是本轮 md 级竞品中结构重叠提升最明显的一个

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
Reflect 通过 MCP 把笔记 artifact 开放给外部编码 agent 读写，方向上正向「跨工具活态 artifact」演化，建议持续观察其是否会进一步打通双向实时同步（而非单向读写）

competitors.name: Raycast
fetched_urls: WebSearch: site:raycast.com Raycast new features AI agent changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 raycast.com 及 manual.raycast.com 页面摘要]
Presets renamed to 'Agents' and reused across chats — update an agent's configuration once and it applies everywhere. Teams can now share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization. Added Memory (chats remember context about you) and Skills (custom instructions/knowledge for recurring tasks), dynamically loaded into chat when relevant. MCP servers can now be installed and used in Quick AI / AI Chat; OpenRouter support added for broader model access. Raycast for iOS launched with chat, note capture, quicklinks, code snippets, cross-device sync.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 raycast.com 及 manual.raycast.com 页面摘要]
Presets renamed to 'Agents' and reused across chats — update an agent's configuration once and it applies everywhere. Teams can now sh

changes.description: Presets 更名为「Agents」并支持跨组织团队共享 AI Agents / Commands / Dictation Styles，统一配置一次即全局生效
changes.evidence: 「Presets are now called Agents, and they're reused across chats. Update an agent's configuration once and the change applies to every chat that uses it」「Teams can now share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5（peripheral 层：菜单栏，不切焦点，快速触达）：作为同处 peripheral 层的产品，Raycast 把「agent 配置」做成可跨团队共享的统一对象，是与 meee2 菜单栏定位最直接的同层竞争信号，但尚未触及「人机同 session 协议」或「live link」的结构核心

changes.description: 新增 Memory（跨对话记住用户上下文）与 Skills（动态按需加载的自定义指令/知识），并支持 MCP server 接入 Quick AI / AI Chat
changes.evidence: 「Added Memory so chats remember context about you and feel more personal. Added Skills so you can give Raycast AI custom instructions and knowledge for the tasks you do often. Skills and AI Extensions are now loaded into the chat dynamically when they're relevant」

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
Raycast「Presets→Agents」改名 + 团队共享配置，是本轮 peripheral 层中与 meee2 最直接的同层信号，建议持续观察其是否会进一步发展出「统一戳 session」式交互

competitors.name: Replit
fetched_urls: WebSearch: site:replit.com OR site:blog.replit.com Replit AI agent multi-agent workspace 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 replit.com / blog.replit.com 系列文章摘要]
Agent 4 launched March 2026, built around four pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster. 'Design Mode has been replaced by the Design Canvas — an infinite board that supports all artifact types, live previews, and direct manipulation tools.' Collaboration: 'The old fork-and-merge collaboration model is gone; teammates now work together in a single shared project with agent-assisted merging... collaborating across backgrounds and roles without anyone stepping on each other's work.' Workflow evolved from plan-then-build to plan-while-building. Multi-Artifact Support: mobile/web apps, landing pages, decks, videos in the same project with shared context. Agent now periodically tests its own code via browser, generating reports and self-fixing issues (reflection loop).
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 replit.com / blog.replit.com 系列文章摘要]
Agent 4 launched March 2026, built around four pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster. 'Design Mode has been

changes.description: Design Mode 被「Design Canvas」取代——一个支持所有 artifact 类型、实时预览（live previews）与直接操作的无限画布
changes.evidence: 「Design Mode has been replaced by the Design Canvas—an infinite board that supports all artifact types, live previews, and direct manipulation tools」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2（live link，而非 snapshot）+ 锚点 #3（descriptive-first canvas）：「无限画布 + 全 artifact 类型 + 实时预览 + 直接操作」是本轮所有抓取中与 meee2「descriptive canvas + live link」组合结构重叠度最高的单一发现，超出原 md 评级所预期的重叠程度

changes.description: 协作模型从「fork-and-merge」转向「单一共享项目内多角色实时协同 + agent 辅助合并」
changes.evidence: 「The old fork-and-merge collaboration model is gone; teammates now work together in a single shared project with agent-assisted merging... collaborating across backgrounds and roles without anyone stepping on each other's work」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1（人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议，人在 agent 图内）：「不同背景角色的人 + agent 在同一项目中实时协同、互不冲突」与 meee2 的人机协同 session 框架方向高度一致

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
⚠️ 威胁等级建议从 md 上调至 hi（threat_changed: true）：Design Canvas（无限画布+全 artifact 类型+live previews+直接操作）与多角色实时协同模型，两条信号叠加后与 meee2 锚点 #1/#2/#3 的结构重叠程度明显超出原 md 评级预期，建议团队复核其分类
「Design Canvas」的 live previews + 直接操作描述，几乎是 meee2 descriptive canvas + live link 组合的逐字映射，建议作为最高优先级竞品功能跟踪对象

competitors.name: Superwhisper
fetched_urls: WebSearch: site:superwhisper.com Superwhisper app new features AI integration 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 superwhisper.com 页面摘要]
April 2026 (v2.13.0): new Modes design with dedicated settings view and improved activation flow, onboarding toasts, integrated Claude Code and Open Code agents. February 2026 (Windows): added Gemini and Grok models plus new OpenAI/Anthropic models; org-level recording retention controls; Vocabulary & Replacements redesign. 'Superwhisper integrates with agentic coding apps like Cursor and Claude Code, allowing users to drive an entire fleet of agents faster than typing.' AI-enhanced mode adapts to the screen for smart results; dictation across 100+ languages with offline/cloud recognition.
competitors.content_hash:
[来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，整合自 superwhisper.com 页面摘要]
April 2026 (v2.13.0): new Modes design with dedicated settings view and improved activation flow, onboarding toasts, integrated Claude Code and Open C

changes.description: 定位语新增「驱动一整支 agent 舰队（fleet of agents）比打字更快」，并集成 Claude Code / Open Code / Cursor 等编码 agent
changes.evidence: 「Superwhisper integrates with agentic coding apps like Cursor and Claude Code, allowing users to drive an entire fleet of agents faster than typing」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5（peripheral 层）+ 锚点 #1（多 session 管理）：「用语音从 peripheral 层驱动一整支 agent 舰队」与 meee2「5 字戳任何 session」的 peripheral 理念方向接近，是 lo 级竞品中少见的结构性信号，但 Superwhisper 仍是单点输入工具，未构建会话/协议层

key_findings: ⚠️ 该源此前持续抓取失败（HTTP 403），本次为首次成功抓取，以下为建立的内容基线，无法确认是否为近期新变化（无法与历史 raw_snapshot 做 diff）。
「驱动 agent 舰队」的定位语方向上向 meee2 peripheral 理念靠近，值得标记观察，但产品形态仍是语音输入外壳而非协议层，threat 维持 lo

alerts.headline: 上线可全屏共享、可嵌入可执行按钮的 Shared Canvas，直接触碰 descriptive canvas + live link 组合
alerts.evidence: 「Shared canvases can now be opened full-screen in the browser, and agents can embed buttons in canvases that will run a specific prompt when clicked」
alerts.action_suggestion: 评估 Cursor Shared Canvas 与 meee2 descriptive canvas 在「可执行性」与「live link（活态而非快照）」两个维度的具体差距，明确 meee2 在「人在 agent 图内」这一协议层面的差异化优势是否仍然成立

alerts.headline: Codex 新增可通过 URL 分享的交互式托管工作空间，主打团队探索、贡献、追踪、共同决策——直接对标 live link 叙事
alerts.evidence: 「Codex can now create and share interactive, hosted websites and apps... Sites can be shared with anyone in your workspace via URL, giving teams a shared place to explore work, contribute input, track progress, and make decisions together」
alerts.action_suggestion: 对比 Codex 分享出的「托管交互站点」与 meee2「跨工具 artifact live link」在更新机制上的本质差异（是否为活态同步还是发布后的固定快照），并将差异写入对外定位素材

alerts.headline: 品牌重塑为「Devin Desktop」，主打「统一指挥中心管理你所有的 agent」——行业正向 meee2 的 session 统一心智收敛
alerts.evidence: 「Devin Desktop is the new name for Windsurf... to introduce the command center for managing all your agents in one place. The Agent Command Center (Spaces, Kanban view, and multi-agent management) is front and center」
alerts.action_suggestion: Devin Desktop 目前仍是「管理 AI agent」视角、未采用「人也是 session、同一协议」的框架——建议加快在外部传播中固化「人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议」这一差异化表述，抢占该术语心智

alerts.headline: Artifacts 升级支持 MCP + 持久化存储，成为「实时动态工作区」；Claude Code 新增 agent 团队协作——平台自身正构建与 meee2 高度重叠的原语
alerts.evidence: 「Artifacts appear in a dedicated window alongside conversations... creating a dynamic workspace where they can see, edit, and build upon Claude's creations in real-time. Artifacts now support MCP and persistent storage」「In Claude Code, you can now assemble agent teams to work on tasks together」
alerts.action_suggestion: 重点评估 meee2 与 Anthropic 平台原生能力（持久化 Artifacts + MCP + agent teams）之间的边界：明确 meee2 在「人机协议」与「跨工具 live link」上是否提供平台原生方案无法覆盖的差异化价值，必要时调整产品路线图优先级

alerts.headline: 推出独立桌面 App，「My Work」视图把所有 agent session/issue/PR/后台自动化汇总到单一仪表盘——直接对标菜单栏式统一管理心智
alerts.evidence: 「The app introduces a 'My Work' view that consolidates active agent sessions, issues, pull requests, and background automations into a single dashboard. Every agent session runs in its own isolated Git worktree」
alerts.action_suggestion: 调研该桌面 app 的交互形态是否会演化为「不切焦点的 peripheral 层」（meee2 的核心定位之一），评估其与 meee2 菜单栏入口在用户心智上的潜在正面冲突

alerts.headline: 「Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank」正式 GA，Google 把「Session」做成持久化跨交互上下文的产品原语，并支持自动交接
alerts.evidence: 「Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank, which give agents persistent context across interactions, are generally available」「your agent can... hand over sessions with auto-connect... without manual oversight」
alerts.action_suggestion: 关注 Google 是否会把「Session」固化为面向开发者和终端用户的通用术语；若该术语在行业内被 Google 抢先标准化，需要评估是否调整 meee2 的「session」相关传播策略以保持差异化清晰度

alerts.headline: Linear Agent 公测上线，支持 MCP 跨工具调查执行 + 带上下文预填 prompt 的跨工具 deeplink——逼近 meee2 跨工具 live link 理念
alerts.evidence: 「Linear Agent can now connect to your tools via MCP, giving it access to data and actions beyond your Linear workspace to investigate issues, plan projects, write specs, and draft updates」「You can now launch your preferred coding tool directly from a Linear issue, with a prefilled prompt that includes the issue ID and all relevant context」
alerts.action_suggestion: 对比 Linear 的「单向 deeplink + 预填上下文」与 meee2「双向活态 live link」的本质差异，将「活态同步 vs. 一次性跳转」作为对外沟通的核心差异化论点之一

alerts.headline: 推出「Design Canvas」——支持全部 artifact 类型、实时预览与直接操作的无限画布，与 meee2 descriptive canvas + live link 组合结构高度重合（建议将该竞品威胁等级从 md 上调至 hi）
alerts.evidence: 「Design Mode has been replaced by the Design Canvas—an infinite board that supports all artifact types, live previews, and direct manipulation tools」
alerts.action_suggestion: 立即将 Replit 列入高优先级跟踪名单（建议团队正式调整其威胁等级为 hi）；详细拆解 Design Canvas 的 live preview 实现机制，明确其与 meee2 「活态 link」在数据同步方向（单向渲染 vs. 双向可写回）上的根本差异，并据此强化产品差异化叙事
